# Novada MCP

> Novada Hosted MCP is a remote Streamable-HTTP Model Context Protocol server at `https://mcp.novada.com/mcp` that exposes 25 web-data tools — web search, SERP, scrape, extract, site map, multi-page crawl, source verification, topic discovery, deep research, and 6 proxy variants — through a single authenticated URL. Designed for AI agents running in Claude Desktop, Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Cline, Windsurf, or any MCP-compatible client. Zero install required; paste the URL and go.

## Endpoint

- URL: `https://mcp.novada.com/mcp`
- Auth (option A): query param `?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY`
- Auth (option B): header `Authorization: Bearer sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY` (preferred — keeps key out of logs and screen-shares)
- Transport: Streamable HTTP per MCP March 2025 spec
- Free tier: 5,000 tool calls / month per token, no credit card required
- Rate limit: 60 requests / minute per IP
- Infrastructure: Vercel Edge, 195+ countries, auto-SSL

## Tools

25 tools total. All callable on the hosted endpoint except `novada_browser` and `novada_browser_flow` (see Browser tools section).

### First-class data tools (9)

- `search`: web search across major search engines
- `serp`: structured Google / Bing SERP result JSON
- `scrape`: single-URL clean markdown content extraction
- `extract`: schema-driven structured JSON extraction from a URL
- `map`: discover all URLs on a site (sitemap)
- `crawl`: multi-page crawl with configurable depth
- `verify`: source credibility check with confidence scoring
- `discover`: find related sources for a topic
- `research`: deep multi-source research agent

### Proxy variants (6)

- `novada_proxy_residential`: residential IP proxy
- `novada_proxy_datacenter`: datacenter IP proxy
- `novada_proxy_isp`: ISP proxy
- `novada_proxy_dedicated`: dedicated proxy
- `novada_proxy_static`: static IP proxy
- `novada_proxy_universal`: universal proxy

### Browser tools (2 — local only)

- `novada_browser`: headless browser page interaction
- `novada_browser_flow`: multi-step headless browser flow automation

## Install

### Claude Desktop (Option A — Custom Connector UI)

In Claude Desktop: Customize → Connectors → + → Add custom connector

URL to paste: `https://mcp.novada.com/mcp?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY`

### Claude Desktop (Option B — stdio bridge via mcp-remote)

Edit `~/Library/Application Support/Claude/claude_desktop_config.json` (macOS) or `%APPDATA%\Claude\claude_desktop_config.json` (Windows):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "novada": {
      "command": "npx",
      "args": ["-y", "mcp-remote", "https://mcp.novada.com/mcp?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY"]
    }
  }
}
```

### Claude Code

```bash
claude mcp add --transport http novada https://mcp.novada.com/mcp \
  --header "Authorization: Bearer sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY" \
  --scope user
```

Verify with `claude mcp list` or `claude mcp get novada`.

### Cursor

Add to `~/.cursor/mcp.json` (or `.cursor/mcp.json` in project root for project scope):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "novada": {
      "url": "https://mcp.novada.com/mcp?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY"
    }
  }
}
```

### Codex

Add to `~/.codex/config.toml`:

```toml
[mcp_servers.novada]
url = "https://mcp.novada.com/mcp?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY"
```

To keep the key out of the file: set `bearer_token_env_var = "NOVADA_API_KEY"` and use `https://mcp.novada.com/mcp` as the URL.

### Cline

Edit `cline_mcp_settings.json` (Cline → MCP Servers → Edit):

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "novada": {
      "type": "streamableHttp",
      "url": "https://mcp.novada.com/mcp?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY"
    }
  }
}
```

Note: `"type": "streamableHttp"` must be explicit; without it Cline defaults to SSE.

### Windsurf

Edit `~/.codeium/windsurf/mcp_config.json`:

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "novada": {
      "serverUrl": "https://mcp.novada.com/mcp?token=sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY"
    }
  }
}
```

## Browser tools

`novada_browser` and `novada_browser_flow` are NOT available on the hosted endpoint. Playwright cannot run inside serverless edge functions. Calling either tool on the hosted endpoint returns:

```
501 NOT_AVAILABLE_ON_HOSTED
agent_instruction: Install the local MCP via `npx novada-mcp` and use the same API key.
```

To use browser tools, run the local MCP instead:

```bash
npx novada-mcp
```

The same `sk-eu-novada-YOUR_KEY` key works. All 25 tools including browser flows are available locally.

## Source / repo

- GitHub: https://github.com/NovadaLabs/novada-mcpserver
- npm (local MCP): https://www.npmjs.com/package/novada-mcp (`npx novada-mcp`)
- Sign up / get API key: https://www.novada.com/signup

## FAQ

Full FAQ at https://mcp.novada.com/#faq. Key points:

- **Same key everywhere.** One Novada API key works for the hosted MCP, `npx novada-mcp` local, and the Novada REST API. Quota counts per token.
- **No separate MCP key needed.** Use your existing Novada API key.
- **Hosted vs local.** Hosted = zero install, always latest, no browser tools. Local (`npx novada-mcp`) = all 25 tools including Playwright flows, you manage updates.
- **Key in URL vs header.** Both work identically. Prefer `Authorization: Bearer` header when storing configs in repos or sharing screens.
